data.title: Wall Street analysts predict less dramatic 'one-time' inflation hike as August 1 tariff deadline nears, with potential increase from 10% to 15%.
data.description: Analysts on Wall Street are predicting a more moderate increase in inflation due to President Trump's tariffs, a shift from earlier fears of a significant surge. Initially concerned about businesses passing on tariff costs to consumers, fears have subsided since Trump's "Liberation Day" in April. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent dubbed tariffs as the "dog that didn't bark," leading to a potential delay or a single inflation hike instead of continuous increases. Goldman Sachs adjusted its trade policy assumptions, anticipating a reciprocal tariff rate increase from 10% to 15% despite doubts about the August 1 tariffs taking effect. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Regenx Tech updates on upgraded facility in Tennessee; operating on track.(Symbol: CSE: RGX, OTCQB: RGXTF, FSE: YRS; WKN: A2DSW3)
data.description: In Edmonton, Alberta on July 24, 2025, Regenx Tech Corp. announced progress on its enhanced facility in Newport, Tennessee. The Company, listed as CSE: RGX, OTCQB: RGXTF, FSE: YRS, WKN: A2DSW3, shared details on this development.

data.title: BitMine Immersion holds over $2 billion of ETH, surpassing its initial $250 million target by 700%. Holdings exceed 560,000, aim to boost Ethereum ecosystem.
data.description: BitMine, a company listed on NYSE AMERICAN under the ticker symbol BMNR, has dramatically increased its Ethereum holdings. The company's current Ethereum holdings stand at an impressive $2 billion, surpassing the initial $250 million PIPE proceeds by over 700%. This equates to BitMine holding more than 560,000 ETH. The company has outlined its Ethereum treasury strategy, which aims to not only bolster its own position but also contribute to the overall strength of the broader Ethereum ecosystem. This news was announced from Las Vegas on July 24, 2025.

data.title: viaNexus introduces MCP Service for agent-driven access to financial data, creating client/server architecture for autonomous systems.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, in New York, viaNexus introduced its MCP Service, a unique implementation that establishes a client/server architecture for autonomous agents. viaNexus is a financial data platform designed for intelligent systems. This release marks a significant advancement in facilitating proper communication between autonomous agents. The MCP Service promises high performance and is the first of its kind in the market.

data.title: Revolution Cooking to feature smart toasters and Macrowave™ Oven at new NYC retail experience.
data.description: Revolution Cooking will be displaying its acclaimed smart toasters and unveiling the highly anticipated Macrowave™ Oven at a cutting-edge retail space in New York City. The event is scheduled for July 24, 2025. Revolution Cooking, known for producing the pioneering touchscreen smart toaster, can be found at Revcook.com.

data.title: Epype and Your Home Digital team up to offer a centralized media bundle for businesses, consolidating content gateways across AI, social media, video sharing, podcasts, and more for enhanced customer interaction.
data.description: Epype and Your Home Digital have unified their content gateways spanning AI, social media, video sharing, podcasts, streaming shows, product offers, blogs, and contact information sharing. Through this collaboration, Epype offers a single convenient platform for mobile engagement, streamlining access to various content formats.

data.title: A&W Food Services of Canada Inc. reported Q2 2025 revenue of $68.8 million with 3.4% System Sales Growth and 1.6% Same Store Sales Growth. Operating costs increased by $3.5 million to $36.0 million, General and administrative expenses decreased by $0.5 million to $11.1 million, and Adjusted EBITDA increased by $4.0 million to $25.5 million. Total System Sales for Q2 2025 were $452.3 million. Net income for Q2 2025 was $12.5 million.
data.description: A&W Food Services of Canada Inc. announced financial results for Q2 2025, ending on June 15, 2025. They reported opening 4 new restaurants and achieving 3.4% System Sales Growth and 1.6% Same Store Sales Growth, driven by marketing campaigns and initiatives. Compared to Q2 2024, System Sales increased by $15.0 million to $452.3 million, revenue increased by $4.5 million to $68.8 million, income before taxes increased by $6.6 million to $17.2 million, and Adjusted EBITDA increased by $4.0 million to $25.5 million. They declared a cash dividend of $0.480 per share, opened 4 new A&W restaurants, and reported net income of $12.5 million for Q2 2025. Additional financial details and comparisons are available in the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: American Airlines reported Q2 2025 results with record $14.4B revenue and $599M net income. Continues investments for growth and improvements.
data.description: American Airlines Group Inc. reported its second-quarter 2025 financial results, including record quarterly revenue of $14.4 billion, GAAP net income of $599 million, or $0.91 per diluted share. Excluding special items, net income was $628 million. The company had an operating margin of approximately 8% and ended the quarter with $12 billion of total available liquidity. Revenue sources included passenger revenue of $13.1 billion, cargo revenue of $211 million, and other revenue of $1.1 billion. The company aims for a third-quarter 2025 adjusted loss per diluted share between ($0.10) and ($0.60), with full-year adjusted earnings per diluted share between ($0.20) and $0.80. Despite challenges like increased storm activity affecting operations, the company remains focused on long-term strategies and investments to bolster revenue performance, loyalty programs, and customer experiences. Operations data also showed an improvement in several key metrics, indicating the company's resilience and promising future prospects.

data.title: First Northwest Bancorp improved profitability, reporting Q2 2025 net income of $3.7M (compared to loss of $9.0M in Q1 2025 and loss of $2.2M in Q2 2024). Company recorded Adjusted PPNR of $2.1M in Q2 2025, compared to $1.5M in Q1 2025 and $530,000 in Q2 2024. No dividend declared for quarter. Key positive trends noted in financial ratios. Net interest margin increased to 2.83% in Q2 2025. Customer deposits rose to $1.55B. ACLL decreased to $18.4M. Non-performing loans remained at $20.4M. Investment securities decreased to $303.5M. Total loans increased to $1.65B. Commercial loan recoveries totaled $1.1M. Dividend not declared for quarter. Positive performance trends observed despite challenges. (Characters: 603)
data.description: First Northwest Bancorp reported net income of $3.7 million for the second quarter of 2025, compared to a net loss of $9.0 million in the first quarter and a net loss of $2.2 million in the second quarter of 2024. Basic and diluted income per share were $0.42 for the second quarter of 2025. Adjusted Pre-Tax, Pre-Provision Net Revenue was $2.1 million. The Board of Directors chose not to declare a dividend. The Bank consolidated operations, leading to a reduction in annual rent expenses. ACLL decreased to $18.4 million. Nonperforming loans totaled $20.4 million. Total noninterest expense was $12.8 million for the second quarter of 2025. Net interest margin increased to 2.83%. Total interest income was $27.1 million, and total noninterest income was $2.2 million. Net loans increased to $1.65 billion. Total securities available for sale decreased to $303.5 million. Return on average assets increased to 0.68%. Classified loans decreased to $30.9 million. The Bank reported a $296,000 recapture of provision for credit losses. Nonaccrual loans totaled $20.4 million. The Bank continues to defend itself in legal proceedings and disputes.

data.title: LexinFintech Holdings Ltd. initiates a $50 million share repurchase program; CEO to buy $10 million worth of shares.
data.description: In Shenzhen, China, on July 21, 2025, LexinFintech Holdings Ltd. (NASDAQ: LX), a prominent technology-focused personal financial service facilitator in China, declared a share buyback initiative. The board sanctioned the company to repurchase up to US$50 million worth of its own shares within the ensuing 12 months. Additionally, CEO Xiao Wenjie intends to invest a maximum of US$10 million from his personal funds to acquire ADSs, augmenting his stake in the company. This buyback program serves as a clear demonstration of Lexin's management's enduring confidence in the company's growth prospects.

data.title: Canadian company discovers significant oil reserves in Poland, estimating up to 40,000 daily barrels, the largest find in Northern Europe in 10+ years.
data.description: The CEO of the company announced a significant find in the Baltic Sea, which is projected to yield approximately 40,000 barrels of oil daily. This discovery marks the most substantial find in Northern Europe in over ten years.
China's Premier at China-EU Business Roundtable: Both sides can focus on service trade, tech innovation, green economy, third-party cooperation and other areas - CCTV.

data.title: Quarterhill Inc. to cut 100 jobs, 15% of its workforce, to lower costs and focus on key goals.
data.description: A Toronto-based company, Quarterhill Inc. (TSX: QTRH) (OTCQX: QTRHF), revealed plans to cut around 100 jobs, which accounts for roughly 15% of its workforce. The decision is part of a strategic move by the company to decrease costs and enhance efficiency.

data.title: DayBlink GPO and Folio partner to streamline procurement for luxury independent hotels, aiming to enhance operational efficiency.
data.description: In Durham, North Carolina, DayBlink GPO, the leading buying consortium for upscale independent hotels, has forged a strategic alliance with Folio, a contemporary financial operations platform for the hospitality sector. This partnership aims to streamline procurement processes throughout hotels, with Folio designated as the primary marketplace for acquiring DayBlink GPO agreements. The collaboration seeks to provide smarter sourcing solutions to independent luxury hotels, bolstering operational efficiency.

data.title: Benchmark Electronics completes vital role in U.S. manufacturing and testing for Intel's Aurora Exascale Supercomputer at Argonne National Laboratory.
data.description: Benchmark Electronics, Inc. revealed the completion and approval of the Aurora exascale supercomputer installation at Argonne National Laboratory. This comes after a partnership with Intel to deliver manufacturing, test development, and test support for the project. As the first exascale computer at Argonne, Aurora is intended to cater mainly to the U.S. scientific sector and Department of Energy. Benchmark Electronics, Inc., a global company offering engineering, design, and manufacturing solutions, is listed on the NYSE as BHE.

data.title: Universal Electronics Inc. will host Q2 2025 financial results call on August 7th in Scottsdale, Arizona. #UEIC
data.description: Universal Electronics Inc., based in Scottsdale, Arizona, has announced that they will be hosting a conference call to discuss their financial results for the second quarter of 2025. The call is scheduled for August 7th and investors, analysts, and the general public are invited to participate. This event is significant as it will provide insights into the company's performance during this period and offer valuable information to stakeholders. Universal Electronics Inc. is a leading company in the industry, and the conference call is expected to shed light on key financial figures and strategic developments.

data.title: D-Wave Quantum to release Q2 2025 financials on August 7, 2025, for quarter ended June 30. Check IR site for details.
data.description: D-Wave Quantum Inc. (NYSE: QBTS), a prominent player in quantum computing solutions, is set to unveil its financial performance for the second quarter of fiscal year 2025, which concluded on June 30, 2025. The results will be made public on Thursday, August 7 before the market opens. Interested parties can access the press release via the D-Wave Investor Relations website at https://ir.dwavesys.com/. Additionally, D-Wave will conduct a conference call on the same day, August 7.
